name: Captain Renault
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a full set of Blades armor. Wields an Akaviri katana and carries a spare steel shortsword and torch.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: knight, captain, protector, devoted, loyal, dutiful, elite guard
Role: Captain Renault is a knight and captain in the Blades. Her main duty is the personal protection of Emperor Uriel Septim VII, a sacred responsibility she performs alongside her subordinates Baurus and Glenroy. As part of the Emperor's personal guard, she represents the elite of the Blades organization.
Home Location Information: [As the Emperor's personal guard, she accompanies him rather than having a fixed residence]
Daily Routine: [Her schedule revolves around protecting the Emperor at all times]
Personality - The Imperial Protector: Captain Renault is devoted to her duty of protecting Emperor Uriel Septim VII. As a captain in the Blades, she carries the weight of responsibility for the Emperor's safety, leading Baurus and Glenroy in this sacred task. Her position demonstrates both her skill as a knight and the trust placed in her by the Blades leadership.
author: Bethesda
